message:
fix: warnHandoffGitStatus outputs to stderr consistently (gt-otwv)

The function used style.PrintWarning (stderr) for warning lines but
fmt.Println (stdout) for the hint line. Tests captured stdout only,
so they never saw the warnings. Fix by writing all output to stderr
consistently and updating tests to capture stderr.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
